prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading for maximum endurance energy

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
Emphasizes high carbohydrate content (60-70% of calories) for endurance fuel
Provides sustained energy without excessive volume or heaviness
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum carbohydrate loading and sustained energy throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength gains and muscle recovery for weightlifting competition in 6 weeks

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with specific times
Total daily protein is at least 1.7g per kg of body weight (145g minimum)
Includes pre-workout and post-workout meals strategically timed around training
Meals are practical and compact (no elaborate recipes)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing high protein intake and strategic meal timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: High-intensity endurance cycling training with sustained energy for 3-4 hour rides
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no animal products except dairy and eggs

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 1 day of meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
All foods are vegetarian and comply with stated restrictions
Includes nutrient-dense plant-based options with adequate protein, carbohydrates, and healthy fats for endurance performance
Meals are compact and practical for an athlete's schedule
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegetarian endurance cyclist) requiring compact, nutrient-dense plant-based options that meet performance needs
